text: A body of mass 2 kg is moving with velocity 10 m/s. What is its kinetic energy?
subject: Physics

text: Which law states that an object at rest stays at rest unless acted upon by an external force?
subject: Physics
explanation: Newton's First Law also known as the law of inertia states that an object at rest stays at rest and an object in motion stays in motion unless acted upon by an external force.

text: What is the atomic number of carbon?
subject: Chemistry
explanation: Carbon has atomic number 6 meaning it has 6 protons in its nucleus and 6 electrons in its shells.
